query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A low-angle nighttime photograph of a cobblestone street in an urban residential area, with a thick curved black metal post in the immediate left foreground. Multi-story apartment buildings with balconies, shuttered windows, and exterior air conditioning units line both sides of the road. Numerous street lamps emit bright star-shaped light along the left side, casting reflections on the cobblestones. Horizontal streaks of red and white light from moving vehicles cross through the center of the frame. Several cars are parked along the right curb beneath a large illuminated billboard, and small trees and potted plants sit on the left sidewalk. Warm yellow light glows from building windows against the dark night sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle nighttime photograph of a cobblestone city street captured with an extreme wide-angle fisheye lens that curves the horizon and bends vertical lines into unstable, skewed angles. A long exposure renders passing vehicles as blurred horizontal streaks of red and white light across the center of the frame. A massive curved black metal post dominates the distorted left foreground. Multi-story apartment buildings with balconies, shuttered windows, and exterior air conditioning units rise along both sides, their facades warped by the lens. Street lamps produce sharp starburst flares, and their light reflects off the cobblestones. Warm interior illumination glows from windows against the dark sky, contrasting with the cooler street lighting.
